name: Butterscotch Chewies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. Add the sugar and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Allow the mixture to cool.
4. Gently add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Mix in the flour and baking powder until combined.
7. Pour the batter into a 9 x 9 inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
